name: python3-pyqt6.qtsensors
title: python3-pyqt6.qtsensors
summary: Python bindings for Qt 6 Sensors module
description:
Python bindings for Qt 6 Sensors module
Qt Sensors API provides access to sensor hardware via QML and C++ interfaces.
.
This package contains the QtSensors module of PyQt6.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use python3-pyqt6.qtsensors because Python bindings for Qt 6 Sensors module.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use python3-pyqt6.qtsensors as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair python3-pyqt6.qtsensors with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `python3-pyqt6.qtsensors --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
